title: Floral, Fluffy Croatian Custard Powder Croissant
description: A quick-fix breakfast dish featuring a creamy custard powder filling and flaky croissants, perfect for raw-friendly snacking.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix custard powder with vanilla extract and soy milk. Stir until smooth.
Pour the custard mixture over one sheet of croissant dough.
If using raw honey, gently swirl it into the custard filling for added sweetness.
Place another sheet of croissant dough on top of the custard-filled dough.
Use a sharp knife to cut through layers carefully and then fold sections into each other to create patterns. Press lightly with fingers to seal seams.
Bake in preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Cool slightly before slicing and serving.
